creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text:
When using opt_VARS, some variables are expanded strangely.

For example:

opt_VARS= FOO=${PKGDIR}     - expands to empty string
opt_VARS= FOO=$${PKGDIR}    - expands to PKGDIR contents
opt_VARS= FOO=${LOCALBASE}  - expands to LOCALBASE contents
opt_VARS= FOO=$${LOCALBASE} - expands to LOCALBASE contents
opt_VARS= FOO=${PREFIX}     - expands to empty string
opt_VARS= FOO=$${PREFIX}    - expands to PREFIX contents
